headline: Expeditors Stock: Is EXPD Underperforming the Industrial Sector?
summary: As Expeditors has underperformed relative to the industrial sector over the past year, Wall Street analysts maintain a cautious outlook on the stock’s prospects.

headline: J.B. Hunt says fuel spike not yet driving intermodal conversion
summary: Management from J.B. Hunt Transport Services said shipper attitudes are little changed as truck capacity leaves the market and fuel prices surge. The post J.B. Hunt says fuel spike not yet driving intermodal conversion appeared first on FreightWaves.
